_meta: P0 + P1 + P2 i18n (en) - floating + main panel + region wizard. See memory/musage-i18n-conventions.md

floating.init_error_hint: Settings panel → Schema overrides to add new field names

footer.hint_unconfigured: No provider key configured → right-click tray → Settings

providers.refresh_interval_help: Empty = use top "Refresh interval". At least 10s (avoid triggering provider rate limit).
providers.delete_extra_confirm:
Delete instance "{name}"?
Its API key will also be deleted.
providers.delete_extra_prompt: To prevent mis-deletion, please enter the full name "{name}" again:

app.refresh_interval_help: Min 10 seconds, default 60. Applies to all providers.
app.tray_style_help: Changes take effect immediately (no save needed). Tooltip still shows full data.

floating.pin_mode_help: Changes take effect immediately (no save needed), and written to config.json to restore on next launch.

top.title: Always on top
top.desc: Floating window always on top layer, not covered by other windows

bottom.title: ⬇ Bottom, hover to bring to top
bottom.desc: Default at bottom, auto bring to top on hover

normal.title: Normal window
normal.desc: No forced z-order, behaves like normal window

floating.low_power_label: Low power mode (disable glass blur + transitions)
floating.low_power_help: Enable on platforms with weak GPUs (old Intel Macs / Linux WebKitGTK) to significantly reduce backdrop-filter overhead.
floating.auto_hide_help: When any app enters fullscreen (menu bar auto-hides) → floating window temporarily hides; exit fullscreen → auto-restores. Currently macOS only.
floating.footer_hint_label: Show footer hint (provider count + quick actions)
floating.footer_hint_help_no_placeholder: Hidden by default. When enabled, the floating window bottom shows the provider count and 'drag to move · right-click menu' hint. Window height auto-adjusts.
floating.position_help: Window position + size are auto-remembered and restored on next launch. Click reset to move the window to the current main screen center.
floating.color_thresholds_help: Default [50, 70, 88]. Changes take effect immediately (no save needed). Backend validates 0 < t0 < t1 < t2 < 100.
floating.color_custom_help: Defaults to iOS system colors (green/cyan/yellow/red). Change any → immediate effect; floating text / progress bar / status dot colors all sync.
floating.wallet_label: Wallet balance alert (turn red when low)
floating.wallet_enable: Enable low-balance highlight (row turns red when remaining < threshold)
floating.wallet_help: Off by default (keeps current blue). When enabled, applies to all 'balance / remaining credits' rows regardless of currency (DeepSeek / ZenMux / OpenRouter etc.), adjust threshold based on your provider balance magnitude.
floating.reset_all_help: One-click reset all 3 items to defaults: thresholds [50,70,88] / iOS default colors / wallet alert off.
floating.wallet_must_be_number: Wallet alert threshold must be a number (or uncheck to disable)

advanced.schema_help_3: Use. One JSON object per line,
advanced.schema_help_4: click Save config (or wait for blur-save in Stage 6). Refer to ccswitch's schema field name reverse-engineering.
advanced.schema_hit_note: must both exist to be a hit,
advanced.xiaomi_monthly_label: Xiaomi MiMo · Monthly candidate field names
advanced.xiaomi_credentials_help:
Xiaomi usage API currently returns 401 for Bearer — API key won't work even if filled.
Normal case: use main panel " Login Xiaomi account"; this is manual fallback.
advanced.xiaomi_cookie_help: Xiaomi usage goes through dashboard admin API, requires browser login state.
advanced.xiaomi_cookie_help_2: How to get it: Chrome login
advanced.xiaomi_cookie_help_3: → F12 → Network → any /api/v1/tokenPlan/* request → right-click → Copy → Copy request headers → find
advanced.xiaomi_cookie_help_4: row and paste the whole line above.
advanced.xiaomi_cookie_help_5: Cookie expires when logged out; on expiry (HTTP 401) error message will guide you to re-paste.

logs.section_help: Red dot at floating window top-right = last fetch failed. Click here for details.
logs.no_logs_to_copy: No logs under current filter to copy
logs.copy_empty: No logs to copy under current filter

about.description: Multi-provider real-time usage monitoring floating window.

order.drag_hint: Hold and drag to adjust floating display count
order.panels_follow_hint: Provider panels below follow this order
order.divider_title: Hold and drag to adjust floating display count
order.divider_label_full: Hidden (drag above to show in floating)

test.app_help: Pull all sources once + show summary

dialog.clear_cookie:
Confirm clearing saved Xiaomi Cookie?
After clearing, you need to re-login.

region.help: Language switches UI strings immediately (no restart). Region sets default provider order and MiniMax endpoint. Two settings are independent — overseas Chinese users can pick CN region + English UI.
region.desc_cn: MiniMax domestic endpoint + Zhipu / Kimi / Xiaomi MiMo / DeepSeek / Qwen as defaults
region.desc_global: OpenRouter / Claude / Tavily / DeepSeek / ZenMux as defaults; MiniMax international endpoint
region.banner: Set your region and UI language to get started

credentials.cookie_login_hint: Don't want to manually copy Cookie?
credentials.cookie_login_help: Click the button below → popup login Xiaomi account → backend auto-extracts Cookie and writes to keys.json, no need to touch DevTools throughout.
credentials.xiaomi_display_mode_help: When "Total only" is selected, falls back to plan's monthly reset time (total is also reset monthly).
credentials.xiaomi_mode_all_hint: (3 rows, auto-merge when plan and total are identical)
credentials.flash_paste_tavily: Please paste Tavily API key first...
credentials.flash_paste_zenmux: Please paste ZenMux API key first...
credentials.flash_paste_xiaomi_api_key: Please paste Xiaomi API key first...
credentials.confirm_clear_xiaomi:
Clear saved Xiaomi Cookie?
You'll need to login again.
credentials.xiaomi_login_only: Quick login only enabled for Xiaomi
credentials.xiaomi_login_opened: Login window opened — will close automatically after login
credentials.xiaomi_clear_done: Cookie cleared, please click " Login Xiaomi account" again
credentials.xiaomi_login_success: Xiaomi login succeeded, cookie saved ({bytes} bytes)
credentials.xiaomi_api_key_hint_extra: Xiaomi usage API currently returns 401 for Bearer — but don't worry, once Cookie is set, Bearer failure auto-falls back (no manual switch needed).
credentials.default_help: API key saved to local keys.json.
credentials.batch_paste_help: One key per line. Auto-detects provider from prefix (sk-cp- / sk-or-v1- / tvly- / Oasis-Token / tp- / sessionKey=). You can also write "minimax=sk-xxx" to be explicit.
credentials.batch_paste_unrecognized: No provider prefix matched for {n} line(s).

extras.xiaomi_region_help: Cluster field reserved for future (multi-account / region-specific URL). Currently cookie auth is user-bound, ignored.
extras.tavily_concise_checkbox: Concise mode (show main metric only "X/Y credits" + progress bar, hide 5 endpoint details)
extras.tavily_concise_help: On by default — 6 rows are too crowded in small floating window. When off, shows search/extract/crawl/map/research endpoint breakdown rows. Click "Save config" to apply.
extras.zenmux_base_url_help: Default uses mode-selected endpoint (PAYG → /payg/balance, subscription → /subscription/detail). Only change for self-hosting / custom path; empty for default.
extras.zenmux_mode_help: PAYG: monitor Pay-As-You-Go wallet balance (like DeepSeek). Subscription: monitor 5h / 7d rolling window subscription usage (like MiniMax).
extras.openrouter_help_text: OpenRouter balance = account credit balance. Regular API key (sk-or-v1-...) works, no Management key needed. See the endpoint docs:
extras.zhipu_region_help: Mainland uses bigmodel.cn API key; international uses z.ai. Keys are not interchangeable. Same schema (unit=3→5h, unit=6→weekly), only host differs.

custom_source.title: Add custom New API source

field.accent_help: Floating card background color (fallback: first letter + this color)
field.api_key: API key (fill first, used for test + save)

custom_source.preset_help: New API series = data.quota / data.used_quota (divide 500000); Balance = user fills path; Custom = 3 independent paths

err.base_url_invalid: Base URL must start with http:// or https://

form.provider_type_help: All 11 built-in providers can have multiple instances (each with its own key); custom is for New API relays
form.api_key_help: Built-in provider instances use separate keys (independent from the built-in 1st copy)
form.custom_callout_body: Use this for one-api / new-api / one-api-type relay stations. Fill in your relay's base URL + path + extract template (3 presets). The same id-based key persists across app restarts.

err.api_key_required: API key must not be empty

help.minimax:
Key saved to local keys.json with 0600 permission (same dir as config, no system keychain, no startup password).

Get it from platform.minimaxi.com.
help.deepseek:
Key saved to local keys.json with 0600 permission (independent of MiniMax key).

Get it from platform.deepseek.com.
help.xiaomimimo:
Token Plan key (starts with tp-, not pay-as-you-go sk-).

Get it after subscribing at platform.xiaomimimo.com.
help.tavily:
Tavily is a common search API for AI agents (not an LLM token plan).

Get the API key from app.tavily.com.
help.zenmux:
ZenMux is an AI model gateway (aggregates Claude / GPT / Gemini etc).

Create at zenmux.ai/platform/management.
help.openrouter:
OpenRouter is an AI model gateway (aggregates 130+ models).

Regular API key (starts with sk-or-v1-) is enough, no Management key needed.

Get it from openrouter.ai/settings/keys.
help.kimi:
Kimi is Moonshot AI's coding plan with 5h + weekly windows.

Create API key at platform.moonshot.cn.
help.zhipu:
Zhipu GLM Coding Plan with 5h + weekly windows.

Auth special: Authorization header without Bearer prefix — use raw key (id.secret format).

Pick CN (bigmodel.cn) or EN (z.ai) in the Region dropdown. The two platforms' keys are not interchangeable.
help.stepfun:
StepFun (阶跃星辰) Step Plan subscription with 5h + weekly windows.

Auth special: use Oasis-Token (Cookie: Oasis-Token=<value>), not regular Bearer.

How to get it: Chrome login platform.stepfun.com → F12 → Network → any request → find Oasis-Token cookie value and paste the whole thing.

Known limit: Oasis-Token typically expires in 7-30 days; on expiry (HTTP 401) you need to re-login and re-extract.

Not yet supported: 3-step OAuth auto-login flow (Phase X).
help.siliconflow:
SiliconFlow (硅基流动) wallet balance, displayed in CNY.

Get the API key from cloud.siliconflow.cn.
help.claude_official:
Claude Pro / Max official OAuth usage monitor.

Auth special: use Cookie sessionKey=<value> (not Bearer API key).

How to get it: Chrome login claude.ai → F12 → Application → Cookies → sessionKey full value (you can paste just the value, app auto-adds sessionKey= prefix).

Known limits:
  • sessionKey expires in ~8h (when claude.ai login session ends)
  • OAuth usage API occasionally 429 (claude-code#31021), this is on Anthropic's side, Musage doesn't retry
help.xiaomi_cookie:
️ Xiaomi usage goes through dashboard admin API, requires browser login state.

How to get it: Chrome login platform.xiaomimimo.com → F12 → Network → any /api/v1/tokenPlan/* request → right-click → Copy → Copy request headers → find cookie: row and paste the whole line above.

Cookie expires when logged out; on expiry (HTTP 401) error message will guide you to re-paste.
help.default: API key saved to local keys.json.
